news.title:
ICICI Securities prefers large private banks like HDFC, Kotak, Axis, citing strong balance sheets and attractive risk-reward ratios.
RBL, Bandhan, City Union, Karur Vysya, DCB, South Indian Bank rated 'Buy'; SME vulnerability and geopolitical risks monitored.
news.summary:
ICICI Securities prefers large private banks like HDFC, Kotak, Axis, citing strong balance sheets and attractive risk-reward ratios.
RBL, Bandhan, City Union, Karur Vysya, DCB, South Indian Bank rated 'Buy'; SME vulnerability and geopolitical risks monitored.

news.title:
Bandhan Bank reported a 12.6% YoY and 6.2% QoQ rise in loans at ₹154,235 Cr.
Total deposits grew 10% YoY to ₹166,344 Cr; CASA ratio improved to 29.3%.
news.summary:
Bandhan Bank reported a 12.6% YoY and 6.2% QoQ rise in loans at ₹154,235 Cr.
Total deposits grew 10% YoY to ₹166,344 Cr; CASA ratio improved to 29.3%.

news.title:
Bandhan Bank's collection efficiency improved to 98.9% in March from 98.1% in December.
The metric rose 12.6% YoY, excluding the bad loan portfolio, per the business update.
news.summary:
Bandhan Bank's collection efficiency improved to 98.9% in March from 98.1% in December.
The metric rose 12.6% YoY, excluding the bad loan portfolio, per the business update.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, PNB, Bandhan Bank revise ATM policies, effective April 1, 2026, impacting withdrawal limits and charges.
HDFC includes UPI in free ATM limits; PNB lowers debit card withdrawal limits; Bandhan caps non-bank ATM transactions.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, PNB, Bandhan Bank revise ATM policies, effective April 1, 2026, impacting withdrawal limits and charges.
HDFC includes UPI in free ATM limits; PNB lowers debit card withdrawal limits; Bandhan caps non-bank ATM transactions.

news.title:
Bandhan Bank sees a 10.3% rise in open interest, indicating higher market activity.
Despite underperforming its sector, rising volumes show shifting investor bets.
news.summary:
Bandhan Bank sees a 10.3% rise in open interest, indicating higher market activity.
Despite underperforming its sector, rising volumes show shifting investor bets.

news.title:
Bandhan Bank held a virtual meet on March 23, 2026, with global institutional investors.
The session focused on strategic insights, company updates, and boosting investor engagement.
news.summary:
Bandhan Bank held a virtual meet on March 23, 2026, with global institutional investors.
The session focused on strategic insights, company updates, and boosting investor engagement.

news.title: Bandhan Bank faces concerns over microfinance collections amid Bengal and Assam elections.
news.summary: Bandhan Bank faces concerns over microfinance collections amid Bengal and Assam elections.

news.title:
Bandhan Bank plunged 8.1% to Rs 161.4 after reports of promoter stake sale plans.
Promoter Bandhan Financial Services may opt for stake sale or IPO for investor exits like IFC, GIC Ventures.
news.summary:
Bandhan Bank plunged 8.1% to Rs 161.4 after reports of promoter stake sale plans.
Promoter Bandhan Financial Services may opt for stake sale or IPO for investor exits like IFC, GIC Ventures.

news.title:
Bandhan Bank shares fell 12%, marking their largest drop since March 2020.
The stock has been declining for three consecutive days.
news.summary:
Bandhan Bank shares fell 12%, marking their largest drop since March 2020.
The stock has been declining for three consecutive days.

news.title:
Bandhan Bank plans share sale or IPO to allow exits for IFC, GIC Ventures.
Move aims to reduce promoter stake to comply with regulations.
news.summary:
Bandhan Bank plans share sale or IPO to allow exits for IFC, GIC Ventures.
Move aims to reduce promoter stake to comply with regulations.

news.title:
Bandhan Bank founder plans to sell his stake, raising investor concerns.
Potential impacts on governance and stock performance are highlighted.
news.summary:
Bandhan Bank founder plans to sell his stake, raising investor concerns.
Potential impacts on governance and stock performance are highlighted.

news.title:
Bandhan Bank is hiring an investment banker to sell promoter shares.
The move aims to facilitate capital raising for the bank.
news.summary:
Bandhan Bank is hiring an investment banker to sell promoter shares.
The move aims to facilitate capital raising for the bank.

news.title:
Bandhan Bank sold Rs 6,872 crore bad loans, reducing GNPA to 3.3%. Profit fell to Rs 206 crore due to provisions and gratuity costs.
Management aims to lower credit costs to 1.6%-1.7% by FY27, targeting ROE recovery to 10%-12%. Stock trades at 1.2x book value amid cautious optimism.
news.summary:
Bandhan Bank sold Rs 6,872 crore bad loans, reducing GNPA to 3.3%. Profit fell to Rs 206 crore due to provisions and gratuity costs.
Management aims to lower credit costs to 1.6%-1.7% by FY27, targeting ROE recovery to 10%-12%. Stock trades at 1.2x book value amid cautious optimism.

news.title:
Bandhan Bank sees a 12.2% rise in open interest, indicating increased derivative activity.
The price momentum and OI surge suggest evolving market positioning for the stock.
news.summary:
Bandhan Bank sees a 12.2% rise in open interest, indicating increased derivative activity.
The price momentum and OI surge suggest evolving market positioning for the stock.

news.title:
Bandhan Bank sees microfinance recovery, with collection efficiency improving to 99.7% and slippages declining.
Secured loans grew 27% YoY, now 57% of total loans, targeting 15-17% CAGR loan growth by FY27.
news.summary:
Bandhan Bank sees microfinance recovery, with collection efficiency improving to 99.7% and slippages declining.
Secured loans grew 27% YoY, now 57% of total loans, targeting 15-17% CAGR loan growth by FY27.

news.title: SBI Mutual Fund gets RBI nod to acquire up to 9.99% stake in Bandhan Bank.
news.summary: SBI Mutual Fund gets RBI nod to acquire up to 9.99% stake in Bandhan Bank.

news.title:
Bandhan Bank projects a 30-40 bps increase in NIM over 3 quarters.
This rise in NIM suggests improved profitability for Bandhan Bank.
news.summary:
Bandhan Bank projects a 30-40 bps increase in NIM over 3 quarters.
This rise in NIM suggests improved profitability for Bandhan Bank.

news.title:
Bandhan Bank forecasts credit costs at 1.7% by FY27, aiming to manage defaults.
Focus on credit quality reflects the bank's strategic approach to risk management.
news.summary:
Bandhan Bank forecasts credit costs at 1.7% by FY27, aiming to manage defaults.
Focus on credit quality reflects the bank's strategic approach to risk management.

news.title: Bandhan Bank reports improvement in slippages, indicating better asset quality.
news.summary: Bandhan Bank reports improvement in slippages, indicating better asset quality.

news.title:
Bandhan Bank shares hit a 7-month high at ₹182.6, gaining 28.2% since Q3 results on Jan 22, driven by improved asset quality.
Brokerages upgraded ratings; Motilal Oswal and ICICI Securities set a target price of ₹175, citing recovery in operating performance.
news.summary:
Bandhan Bank shares hit a 7-month high at ₹182.6, gaining 28.2% since Q3 results on Jan 22, driven by improved asset quality.
Brokerages upgraded ratings; Motilal Oswal and ICICI Securities set a target price of ₹175, citing recovery in operating performance.
